mapper.sql: SELECT i.id, i.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS userNickname, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.answer, i.answered_at AS answeredAt, i.created_at AS createdAt FROM inquiries i LEFT JOIN users u ON i.user_id = u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiries (user_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
